name: tradejournal
description: TradeJournal — live trading journal (PWA + iOS via Capacitor)

scripts.build:www: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www/assets && cp index.html styles.css app.js manifest.webmanifest sw.js www/ && cp -R assets/. www/assets/
scripts.sync: npm run build:www && cap sync ios
scripts.ios: npm run sync && cap open ios
